claims: Intelligence can be defined as speed times correctness.
AI can amplify speed but not correctness.
AI cannot tell you what product to build.
When AI can tell you what to do to make money, it will reach AGI.

claims: Human decision-making is primarily driven by hormones; knowledge, experience, and reason play a minor role.
People often decide first and then find evidence to justify their decisions.
If a decision maker does not bear risk or loss, they cannot make correct decisions under pressure.
summary: The post argues that human decision-making is hormone-driven, with knowledge and reason playing minor roles, quoting 'skin in the game'.
title: 人只有在真实的环境里才能做出正确的决定。 人类学研究表明，人类的决策过程主要是由激素推动的，知识，经验，理智在这个过程中所起的作用并不大。 我们往往是做出决定之后，再用智慧去寻找证据以便证明自己的决定...

claims: 哪个模型最牛逼？arena榜都被刷烂了，要看就看Vercel的最新报告。
场景越关键Anthropic份额越高，近乎垄断。
core_facts: Anthropic accounts for 61% of cost share; Google accounts for 38% of token volume.
Claude Opus is expensive but used for important tasks; Gemini Flash is cheap and high-volume.
B2B generates 29.7% of tokens but 40.7% of costs.
In critical backend tasks, Anthropic holds 87% share; consumer use is split three ways.
Agent requests rose from 31.6% to 58.9% in 6 months; agent requests consume 2.6x more tokens than regular chat.
Large teams use an average of 35 models.
event_type: Vercel AI model token consumption report
summary: Vercel报告分析了20万个项目、7个月、十万亿token的消耗数据：Anthropic占费用61%，Google占token量38%；Agent请求占比半年从31.6%升至58.9%；大规模团队平均用35个模型。
